dimensions.name: Packaging: title and promise
dimensions.note: Title should be specific, curiosity-driven, and not clickbait.

dimensions.name: First 30 seconds: pattern interrupt
dimensions.note: Cold open must quickly establish tension and the visible artifact.

dimensions.name: Retention architecture
dimensions.note: Expert long-form needs more than a static explainer: open loop, stakes, teardown, fix, payoff, CTA.

dimensions.name: Proof density
dimensions.note: Use concrete tools, metrics, before/after score, and a before/after bullet.

dimensions.name: Visual plan
dimensions.note: Long-form must keep artifacts on-screen, not become presenter-only.

dimensions.name: Trust and claim safety
dimensions.note: No ATS mythology, fake outcomes, fabricated rankings, or callback guarantees.

dimensions.name: Audience empathy and creator voice
dimensions.note: Should feel like a sharp creator teardown, not generic SaaS education.

dimensions.name: Product bridge
dimensions.note: CTA should be useful and trust-preserving.

dimensions.name: Audio readiness
dimensions.note: Publish-ready long-form requires voiceover/narration plus balanced music.

dimensions.name: Render and QA evidence
dimensions.note: Must include rendered MP4 and QA pass before publish-ready status.
